title: GrantLayer Demo Runner / API Smoke Manifest
description: Machine-readable smoke manifest for the GL-061 demo runner. Defines the ordered Product Core sequence, stable identifiers, referenced example files, and verification commands for a local dry-run confidence check.

steps.name: Grant Request
steps.purpose: Create a structured grant request capturing the subject, role, action, resource, validity window, and reason.
steps.contractNote: Documented OpenAPI POST path. Field contracts are definitive in docs/openapi.yaml.

steps.name: Approval Result
steps.purpose: Approve the request and produce a linked Grant record with an approval decision.
steps.contractNote: Documented OpenAPI POST path. Approval atomically creates the linked Grant.

steps.name: Grant
steps.purpose: Retrieve the signed Grant record containing Ed25519 signature, SHA-256 payload hash, and signing key ID.
steps.contractNote: Documented OpenAPI GET path. The Grant is created during approval and contains GL-050 integrity fields.

steps.name: Grant Execution
steps.purpose: Record the protected action attempt, linking the Execution to the Grant and the original Grant Request.
steps.contractNote: Documented OpenAPI POST path. Each execution represents one protected action attempt.

steps.name: Evidence Item
steps.purpose: Build an Evidence Bundle aggregating the grant, execution, audit trail, and a deterministic SHA-256 integrity hash.
steps.contractNote: Documented OpenAPI GET path. Returns the evidence bundle for a given execution.

steps.name: Evidence Completeness
steps.purpose: Compute a structured completeness score and readiness flag from execution presence, evidence presence, verification status, and provenance events.
steps.contractNote: Documented OpenAPI GET path. Provides a machine-readable completeness assessment.

steps.name: Compliance Gap Report
steps.purpose: Generate automated gap detection mapped to a severity catalogue with recommended actions.
steps.contractNote: Documented OpenAPI GET path. Returns critical/high/medium/low gaps for the execution.

steps.name: Policy Requirements Result
steps.purpose: Evaluate machine-readable policy rules against subject evidence, exclusions, deadlines, amount limits, required roles, and approval policies.
steps.contractNote: Documented OpenAPI POST path. Returns a policy evaluation result with blockers and warnings.

steps.name: Decision Provenance Summary
steps.purpose: Synthesize evidence completeness, compliance gaps, permissions, approvals, provenance events, and policy results into a single structured decision record.
steps.contractNote: Documented OpenAPI POST path. Builds a decision provenance summary for the execution.

steps.name: Auditor Export
steps.purpose: Produce an institutional auditor export combining all upstream signals into a single structured record with section coverage, blockers, and audit-readiness status.
steps.contractNote: Documented OpenAPI POST path. Builds an exportable auditor record for the workflow.

steps.name: Compliance Readiness Summary
steps.purpose: Build a composite readiness summary across evidence, compliance, permission, approval, provenance, auditor, and policy dimensions.
steps.contractNote: Documented OpenAPI POST path. Returns the final readiness verdict for the workflow.

referencedExamples.title: Grant Request
referencedExamples.description: A minimal Grant Request with subject, role, action, resource, and reason.

referencedExamples.title: Approval Result
referencedExamples.description: An approval record referencing the request and producing the grant.

referencedExamples.title: Grant
referencedExamples.description: A signed Grant with Ed25519 signature, payload hash, and signing key ID.

referencedExamples.title: Grant Execution
referencedExamples.description: An execution record linking the grant, request, and workflow.

referencedExamples.title: Evidence Item
referencedExamples.description: An Evidence Bundle with grant summary, execution summary, audit trail, and SHA-256 hash.

referencedExamples.title: Evidence Completeness
referencedExamples.description: A completeness report showing a full score and readiness status.

referencedExamples.title: Compliance Gap Report
referencedExamples.description: A compliance gap report with no gaps and no recommended actions.

referencedExamples.title: Policy Requirements Result
referencedExamples.description: A policy evaluation showing a passed status with no blockers.

referencedExamples.title: Decision Provenance Summary
referencedExamples.description: A decision provenance record synthesising all upstream signals.

referencedExamples.title: Auditor Export
referencedExamples.description: An auditor export pulling together every signal into a single audit-ready document.

referencedExamples.title: Compliance Readiness Summary
referencedExamples.description: A readiness summary scoring all dimensions as ready.

referencedExamples.title: Minimal Flow Bundle
referencedExamples.description: A lightweight index listing every artifact, its path, and the stable IDs that connect them.

nonGoals: Production authentication (OAuth, JWT, SSO, HSM-backed key management)
SDK generation (Python, JavaScript, Go client libraries)
Live API server requirement for GL-061 dry-run

relatedArtifacts.title: Integrator Quickstart Examples
relatedArtifacts.purpose: Minimal static JSON examples used as the data source for this smoke manifest.

relatedArtifacts.title: Minimal API Usage Walkthrough JSON
relatedArtifacts.purpose: Machine-readable walkthrough index with stable IDs and OpenAPI path references.

relatedArtifacts.title: Pilot-Ready Handoff Plan
relatedArtifacts.purpose: Packages Integration-Ready v0 into a clear technical handoff for pilot discussions.

relatedArtifacts.title: Pilot-Ready Release Decision
relatedArtifacts.purpose: Formally records the current Pilot-Ready state and confirms readiness for first technical pilot discussion.

relatedArtifacts.title: Demo Runner Validation Test
relatedArtifacts.purpose: Validates that the demo runner script, smoke manifest, and usage document are present, coherent, and aligned.
